_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of autophagy as a novel treatment for neurofibromatosis type 1 tumors.

_contextSnippet: Autophagic flux was significantly higher in NF1−/− cells (ipNF95.11b 'C' and ipNF05.5) relative to NF1+/− controls...baseline expression of LC3B...was found to be increased in NF1−/− cells
resourceName: ipNF95.11b 'C' (hTERT NF1 ipNF95.11b C, RRID: CVCL_UI67)
details: Showed significantly higher autophagic flux relative to NF1+/- controls and increased baseline expression of LC3B protein
